content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！《忘却前夜》新OST已发布，欢迎收听、下载及分享。
如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用。

**忘却前夜OST丨庞托斯EP·无休的凯旋**
愚蠢的、肤浅的、自高自大的、外强中干的离群者建立了自己的国。
一成不变的空壳们不会吐露出真话，因为没有什么，能从沟壑里重新拼凑起那颗过于害怕变化，以至于过早破碎的心。

✦ 曲：F.R.K. / B.I.A.V. Studio
✦ 企划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens new OST was released today. Welcome everyone to listen, download and share.
If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

**Morimens OST┊Pontos EP: The Unending Triumph**
Foolish, shallow, vainglorious, solitary—the brittle despot has forged a kingdom of his own.
Immutable shells breathe no truth; for nothing can piece together, from the ravine, a heart too afraid of change—and so shattered before its time.    

✦ Composer: F.R.K. / B.I.A.V. Studio
✦ Planning: B.I.A.V. Studio

**01. 欲落之月-The Falling Moon**
月亮嘻嘻发笑，月亮窃窃私语。
月亮说命运啊，命运啊，命运要落下来了。

The moon giggles, the moon whispers.
Fate, oh fate, the moon says—fate is about to fall.

**02. 祂们的厄洛斯-Their Eros**
他在无知无觉中让人们留下了一些东西。
他在无知无觉中，和他们一样遗落了一些东西。

Unwittingly, he had people leave something with him.
Unwittingly, he left something behind, just as they did.

**03. 碑痕-Scars of the Cenotaph**
活着的人苦苦寻找着一座可以用于缅怀的墓碑。
死去的人只是死去。

The living desperately sought a cenotaph to mourn by.
The dead simply died.

**04. 旧魂灵-Old Souls**
你被许诺了一个永不可近的乌有乡，那里装着你记忆里所有亲切的旧魂灵。
You were promised an unreachable utopia, where all the dear old souls in your memory reside.

**05. 夕阳将坠-The Sinking Sun**
太阳已经坠入海面，最后一缕阳光藏进他的身后。
晨与昏会在下一刻交替，他会让此处的一切如常。

The sun has slipped beneath the tide, the last thread of light veiled behind him.
Dawn and dusk will trade places in the next breath, and he will keep all things here as they are.

**06. 困于海洋-Trapped in the Sea**
对于鱼群来说，窒息是它们离开海洋后，唯一能拥有的感受。
For the shoal, to leave the sea is to know nothing but suffocation.
